title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MRF is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
